mapper.sql: playlist_id, user_id, playlist_name, description, is_public, cover_image_url, like_count, is_imported, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM playlist WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT FROM playlist WHERE is_public = true AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist WHERE is_public = true AND is_deleted = false

SELECT pl.playlist_id, pl.user_id, pl.playlist_name, pl.description, pl.is_public, pl.cover_image_url, pl.like_count, pl.is_imported, pl.is_deleted, pl.created_at, pl.updated_at, pl.created_by, pl.updated_by, COUNT(DISTINCT pi.playlist_item_id) AS item_count, 0 AS is_shared FROM playlist pl LEFT JOIN playlist_item pi ON pi.playlist_id = pl.playlist_id LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.playlist_id = pl.playlist_id AND p.category = 'PLAYLIST_SHARE' AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.is_deleted = false WHERE pl.user_id = #{userId} AND pl.is_deleted = false GROUP BY pl.playlist_id, pl.user_id, pl.playlist_name, pl.description, pl.is_public, pl.cover_image_url, pl.like_count, pl.is_imported, pl.is_deleted, pl.created_at, pl.updated_at, pl.created_by, pl.updated_by HAVING MAX(p.post_id) IS NULL ORDER BY pl.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist pl WHERE pl.user_id = #{userId} AND pl.is_deleted = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM posts p WHERE p.playlist_id = pl.playlist_id AND p.category = 'PLAYLIST_SHARE' AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.is_deleted = false )
mapper.update: UPDATE playlist SET playlist_name = #{playlistName}, description = #{description}, is_public = #{isPublic}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId}
UPDATE playlist SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId}
UPDATE playlist SET like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId}
UPDATE playlist SET like_count = CASE WHEN like_count > 0 THEN like_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId}
mapper.select: SELECT pi.playlist_item_id, pi.playlist_id, pi.movie_id, pi.sort_order, pi.added_at, pi.created_at, pi.updated_at, m.title AS movie_title, m.poster_path, m.rating FROM playlist_item pi LEFT JOIN movies m ON pi.movie_id = m.movie_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE pi.playlist_id = #{playlistId} ORDER BY pi.sort_order ASC, pi.added_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO playlist_item (playlist_id, movie_id, sort_order, added_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{playlistId}, #{movieId}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO playlist_likes (playlist_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{playlistId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})

INSERT INTO playlist_item ( playlist_id, movie_id, sort_order, added_at, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT #{destPlaylistId}, movie_id, sort_order, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() FROM playlist_item WHERE playlist_id = #{srcPlaylistId}
